translations.01KQXQV12EEXD0W77R0G29BCNB: 计划 ID 已复制到剪贴板
translations.01KQXQV12G8662S0M0HMPK62WY: 此计划已同步到您的 Warp Drive，您所做的任何编辑都将自动保存。

notes: lsp_telemetry.rs: 10 entries are all telemetry event descriptions (fn description() returning &'static str used as telemetry dimension) -> flag_telemetry_payload. ai_document_view.rs: all UI text (toast labels, button labels, tooltip, query text sent via send_user_query_in_conversation rendered in chat history); 'I've updated the plan.' is the user-visible query sent to the agent -> translate. rule_editor.rs: all UI (placeholder text, button labels, form labels). auth/mod.rs: dialog text, modal button labels; format strings have {plural} substituted with English words (process/processes, session/sessions, object/objects, file/files) -> kept English word inline ('您有 X 个 {plural} 正在运行', '您有 X 个共享 {plural}'). ai_context_menu/view.rs: category labels + loading text; 'View handle should be upgradeable.' is a .expect() panic -> flag_panic_message. session_config_rendering.rs: all settings UI labels. universal_developer_input.rs: tooltip text. theme_creator_body.rs: modal subheader + error toast + form labels (all UI). warpui_core/async/native/mod.rs: 6 entries are all doc-comment lines inside trait_set! macro body -> extractor false positive doc comment.
